name: Refried Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 Jalapeno Chiles; Seed and finely chop
1 Chipotle Chile; Canned in Adobo Sauce, finely chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the Jalapeno peppers and remove the seeds carefully.
2. Finely chop the remaining ingredients.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Add chopped onions, garlic, chipotle chile, and red chiles; sauté until fragrant.
5. Drain black beans and add to the pan with salt.
6. Mash everything together, cooking until heated through.
7. Adjust seasoning if needed, then serve.
